reviews.comment:
Buena y rápida atención de los chicos de la playa

(Translated by Google)
Good and fast service from the guys at the beach

reviews.comment:
Por ser de ACA falta mantenimiento. Y no siempre está abierto. Es un buen punto de parada para los viajeros como la Shell vecina que es más grande.

(Translated by Google)
Being an ACA station, it lacks maintenance. And it's not always open. It's a good stop for travelers, like the larger Shell station next door.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPbC1YcmpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena variedad de comidas, lástima que ni tiene disponible la app de YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Good variety of food, too bad the YPF app isn't available.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPNTY2aFZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención,fui muchas veces a buenos aires con mi familia y pasába siempre con mi familia

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. I went to Buenos Aires many times with my family and always spent time there.

reviews.comment:
Cierra de noche, tener en cuenta, abre 6 o más tarde, pasamos 5,50hs. Y estaba cerrada.

(Translated by Google)
It closes at night, keep in mind, it opens at 6 or later, we passed at 5:50 a.m. And it was closed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPNjkzYU5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Estuve esperando 30 minutos xq iban a aumentar los precios y no estaban atendiendo.  Me tuve q ir sin cargar.

(Translated by Google)
I waited 30 minutes because they were going to raise prices and they weren't helping anyone. I had to leave without charging my phone.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPeS1QcDFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y mucha honestidad en sus empleados. En mi caso, me olvidé el celular sobre la mesa, lo encontraron, lo guardaron, me atendieron cuando llame desde otro número, y me lo devolvieron. GESTO PARA IMITAR POR EL RESTO DE LA SOCIEDAD. Muy bien café y variedad en dulces y saladitos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and very honest employees. In my case, I forgot my cell phone on the table. They found it, stored it, answered my call from a different number, and returned it to me. A gesture the rest of society should imitate. Excellent coffee and a variety of sweet and savory items.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPczk2LXJBRRAB
